• Interactive educational website explaining nuclear energy concepts
  • Covers fission, uranium enrichment, reactor types, and fusion
  • Includes Cold War nuclear history and modern geopolitical context
  • Features animated visualizations and particle effects
  • Responsive design with scroll-triggered animations and parallax effects
    const canvas = document.getElementById('particle-canvas');
    const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

This interactive explainer website teaches nuclear energy concepts through animated visualizations, covering fission, fusion, reactor designs, and geopolitical context. The site features scroll-triggered animations, particle effects, and educational content about the science and history of nuclear power.
